title: `aram #6191
definition:
1) to be subtle, be shrewd, be crafty, beware, take crafty counsel,
    be prudent
    1a) (Qal) to be crafty, be subtle
    1b) (Hiphil) to be crafty, be or become shrewd
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be subtle, be shrewd, be crafty, beware, take crafty counsel,
    be prudent
    1a) (Qal) to be crafty, be subtle
    1b) (Hiphil) to be crafty, be or become shrewd

    NASB:  to be shrewd or crafty
